relations.note: Chart usage applies the palette hierarchy to charts specifically.
Constrains a tertiary color within the overall palette ratio.

quotes: Apply the palette in the **primary > secondary > tertiary ratio** shown in the guide: blues and golds dominate; tertiary colors are accents and surfaces.

rules.intent: Preserve brand color dominance and hierarchy.
rules.rule_text: Apply the palette in the primary > secondary > tertiary ratio shown in the guide: blues and golds dominate; tertiary colors are accents and surfaces.

quotes: **Headlines/headings:** Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds).
**Body text:** Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds (with increased line height, §1.2).
**Headlines/headings:** Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds).
**Body text:** Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds (with increased line height, §1.2).

rules.intent: Ensure legible, on-brand text color per background.
rules.rule_text: Headlines/headings use Brand Blue (headline.color = #00529b), or White on dark/gradient backgrounds. Body text uses Graphite (body.color = #212121) on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds with increased line height (body.line_height 150% → 160% on dark). Light/dark switching lives on the tokens.

quotes: **Sunshine/Gold strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures**
**Charts/about:blank** Brand Blue + Sky Blue dominant; **Sunshine/Gold strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures**; gray for placebo.

rules.intent: Keep chart emphasis colors reserved for key data points.
rules.rule_text: In charts, Brand Blue (#00529b) + Sky Blue (#358CCB) are dominant; Sunshine/Gold (#faa31b / #ffc60a) is strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures; placebo uses gray.

quotes: **Callout surfaces:** Light Blue at 70% tint (data callouts); Golden Sand at 30% tint (text-heavy callouts).
**Callout surfaces:** Light Blue at 70% tint (data callouts); Golden Sand at 30% tint (text-heavy callouts).

rules.intent: Distinguish callout types by tinted surface color.
rules.rule_text: Callout surfaces use Light Blue at 70% tint (#E6F0F9 @ 70%) for data callouts and Golden Sand at 30% tint (#FEF1C8 @ 30%) for text-heavy callouts.

quotes: **Coral:** sparing tertiary accent only — never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data.
**Coral:** sparing tertiary accent only — never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. **[GENERAL]:** avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.

rules.intent: Restrict Coral to minimal accent usage.
rules.rule_text: Coral (#F26A38) is a sparing tertiary accent only — never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. [GENERAL] Avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.

quotes: **Links [GENERAL]:** Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark.
**Links [GENERAL]:** Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark.

rules.intent: Consistent, legible link styling across backgrounds.
rules.rule_text: [GENERAL] Links are Brand Blue (body.link.color = #00529b), underlined (body.link.decoration = underline) on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark backgrounds.

quotes: 70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances
The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances** (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).

rules.intent: Protect correct logo mark rendering across all uses.
rules.rule_text: The logo icon's 70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a (logo.mark.opacity = 0.7) must be maintained in all instances, including the logo and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic.
